name: telecommunications_mutual_aid_request_harbor_tru_loy
premise: Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: telecommunications mutual aid request harbor tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Leila Diallo
agents.identity: I am Leila Diallo, the accountable decision-maker on this Telecommunications bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Arjun Patel
agents.identity: I am Arjun Patel, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Leila Diallo must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Leila Diallo do?
